response.step_by_step_log: Identified two songs with on-screen text: 'Zanki' and 'Identity'. Used search queries: 'Zanki ACAね Japanese and English lyrics' and 'Identity Kanaria Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics for both. Performer is Kronii.
response.global_summary: A two-song musical performance by Kronii, featuring 'Zanki' by ZUTOMAYO and 'Identity' by Kanaria.

scenes.description: Kronii begins singing 'Zanki', with the title and artist credits displayed on screen.
